originalTitle: US military jets and drones tracked near Cuba as tensions rise
summary: Tracking data shows several flights by US Navy reconnaissance jets and drones during the last week.
content: Tracking data shows several flights by US Navy reconnaissance jets and drones during the last week.
chineseTitle: 随着紧张局势升级，美国军用飞机和无人机在古巴附近被追踪
chineseSummary: 跟踪数据显示，美国海军侦察机和无人机在上周进行了多次飞行。
chineseContent: 跟踪数据显示，美国海军侦察机和无人机在上周进行了多次飞行。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
